title: Scottish Police Investigate Laser Incident Involving Search and Rescue Helicopter

sections.heading: Incident Overview
sections.content: Scottish police have launched an investigation into an incident involving a search and rescue helicopter, during which a laser was reportedly shone at the aircraft. Authorities have described the act as reckless.

sections.heading: Ongoing Enquiries
sections.content: Police are actively working to gather information and are appealing for witnesses to come forward as part of the ongoing enquiries.

sourceReferences.citationText: scotsman-news – Scottish police hunt culprit after laser shone at search and rescue helicopter in ‘reckless’ act
